rationale: Both original blocking findings are resolved: CR-001 now requires CODEMIE_SKIP_SECRETS_SCAN=1 to skip secrets scanning (auditable bypass), and CR-002 has a unit test asserting sendSessionEnd receives session.repository. No new issues introduced.

business_review.criterion: AC1 – repository field present in metrics payload
business_review.notes: Carried forward from final round — no change.
Carried forward from final round — no change.

business_review.criterion: AC2 – credential/token stripping from HTTPS URLs
business_review.notes: Carried forward from final round — edge case for single-segment user:pass@ paths deferred.

business_review.criterion: AC3 – graceful handling when origin remote is missing
business_review.notes: Carried forward from final round — no change.

business_review.criterion: AC4 – tests cover SSH remotes and credential stripping
business_review.notes: sendSessionEnd test added in fix-up; both sendSessionStart and sendSessionEnd repository forwarding are now verified.

standards_review.notes: Fix-up commit uses fix(analytics) scope — valid.
No new type issues in fix-up.

standards_review.standard: Security (no raw credentials in logs or payloads)
standards_review.notes: CR-001 resolved: secrets gate now enforces Docker requirement unless explicitly opted out via CODEMIE_SKIP_SECRETS_SCAN=1.

finding_status.notes: Both skip branches now exit(1) with actionable error messages unless CODEMIE_SKIP_SECRETS_SCAN=1 is set; bypass is explicit and auditable.
New test calls finalizeSession and asserts mockSendSessionEnd received { repository: 'codemie-ai/codemie-code' }.
